title: anacamptis × ticinensis
intro: Anacamptis × ticinensis, also known as the Ticinese orchid, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Anacamptis morio and Orchis italica. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Ticinese orchid is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its availability and usage may vary due to its rarity and specific growing conditions.
